title: senecio trilobus
intro: Senecio trilobus, also known as the three-lobed groundsel, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating liver and joint issues. The plant's extracts and compounds have shown potential health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Senecio trilobus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
